chosen_action.title: Fix publisher-route truthfulness and active-window packet refresh gating

why_this_action.summary: The latest lane state already required a distribution architecture repair, and the best immediate improvement was to fix selector truthfulness around sendable publisher routes and active-short-window packet refresh decisions instead of emitting more outbound or another stale follow-through note.
shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: current lane already escalated to distribution_architecture_repair
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now handoff packet remains in this review window
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json/.md: same-run code/test/process repair is explicitly allowed
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg adoption is still flat and remains the primary gate

result.summary: Patched the selector to recognize verified manual publisher routes more truthfully and to avoid forcing a stale primary-repo-flat packet during active short windows when another truer follow-through state still exists.
